perturbation.original_text: For the purposes of this Agreement, unless the context requires otherwise, the following terms shall have the meanings set forth below: "Additional Countries" shall have the meaning set forth in Section 2.3 of this Agreement. "Affiliate" means, with respect to a Party, any corporation, association, or other entity which, directly or indirectly, controls the Party or is controlled by the Party or is under common control with such Party, where "control" means the possession, directly or indirectly, of the power to direct or cause the direction of the affairs or management of a corporation, association, or other entity through the ownership of fifty percent
perturbation.changed_text: For the purposes of this Agreement, unless the context requires otherwise, the following terms shall have the meanings set forth below:  "Affiliate" means, with respect to a Party, any corporation, association, or other entity which, directly or indirectly, controls the Party or is controlled by the Party or is under common control with such Party, where "control" means the possession, directly or indirectly, of the power to direct or cause the direction of the affairs or management of a corporation, association, or other entity through the ownership of fifty percent
perturbation.explanation: By removing the definition of "Additional Countries" in Section 1.1, while Section 2.3 still refers to it, this creates an in-text contradiction. Section 2.3 relies on a definition that no longer exists within the contract, leading to uncertainty about the scope and implementation of that clause.
perturbation.contradicted_text: 2.3 Additional Countries. Miltenyi acknowledges that Bellicum and/or its Licensees may from time to time desire to use Miltenyi Products in one or more countries that are currently not part of the Designated Countries (each, an "Additional Country"). The Parties agree, upon reasonable written request by Bellicum from time to time during the term of this Agreement, to evaluate the regulatory requirements for utilizing of Miltenyi Products for manufacture of Bellicum Products in the requested Additional Country(ies). Based on the assessment of potentially required additional work ("Additional Work"), including but not limited to regulatory work pursuant to Section 4.9 as may be required to prepare and file Master Files for Miltenyi Products in support of Bellicum Product filings in such Additional Country(ies), the Parties will negotiate in good faith with the goal of entering into an agreement on mutually acceptable terms with respect to Miltenyi's provision of such Additional Work. Bellicum shall inform Miltenyi in writing at least twelve (12) months in advance prior to any intended regulatory filing in an Additional Country.
perturbation.justification: The original text contained a definition for "Additional Countries", which was removed in the changed text. Section 2.3 refers to "Additional Countries", creating a contradiction because the term is used without a definition within the contract. This removal makes Section 2.3 ambiguous and potentially unenforceable, as the scope of "Additional Countries" is no longer defined. This aligns with the definition of "Omissions – In Text Contradiction", as essential language was removed creating a contradiction with obligations stated in other sections.

perturbation.original_text: Minimum Purchases referred to above will include the quantities of Miltenyi Product(s) ordered by Bellicum in accordance with applicable Forecasts that could not be supplied by Miltenyi. At the time Bellicum reaches the Minimum Purchase requirements again, Miltenyi and Bellicum shall in good faith agree to continue the supply commitment.
perturbation.changed_text: Minimum Purchases referred to above will include the quantities of Miltenyi Product(s) ordered by Bellicum in accordance with applicable Forecasts that could not be supplied by Miltenyi.
perturbation.explanation: By omitting the second sentence in Section 5.6, which states 'At the time Bellicum reaches the Minimum Purchase requirements again, Miltenyi and Bellicum shall in good faith agree to continue the supply commitment,' the contract creates ambiguity. The section now implies that merely reaching the minimum purchase requirements automatically reinstates Miltenyi's supply commitment, which contradicts the initial contingency that such commitment is re-established only after a good faith agreement.
perturbation.contradicted_text: (a) Contingent upon Bellicum's continued adherence to its obligations in accordance with this Agreement, including the Forecast obligations and Firm Zone Requirements pursuant to Sections 5.1 and 5.3 above, Miltenyi shall use [...***...] have and devote adequate manufacturing capacity to ensure continuous supply of Miltenyi Products to Belicum in accordance with the Forecasts during the Term, in accordance with the provisions of this Section 6.7. However, Miltenyi's compliance with this Section 6.7(a) shall not require Miltenyi to incur any significant expenses to purchase new equipment, to install equipment purchased or requested by Bellicum, or to add (or, for clarity, allocate or dedicate) additional manufacturing or storage capacity for the manufacturing and supply of Miltenyi Products to Bellicum hereunder.
perturbation.justification: The original text explicitly stated that the supply commitment would continue after reaching minimum purchases again only if Miltenyi and Bellicum agreed in good faith. The changed text omits this condition, implying that the supply commitment automatically reinstates upon reaching minimum purchases. This directly contradicts section 6.7(a) which makes Miltenyi's supply obligation 'contingent upon Bellicum's continued adherence to its obligations.' By removing the 'good faith agreement' clause, the modified text weakens Miltenyi's protections and introduces uncertainty about when the supply commitment restarts, creating a clear contradiction.

perturbation.original_text: EXHIBIT F Discounts Table 1 of Exhibit F: Discount Scheme for Miltenyi Products, forecasted to be purchased by Bellicum under the Supply Agreement 50 MILTENYI & BELLICUM Supply Agreement (Execution CopyMarch 27, 2019) [...***...] For Discount Scale Definition, see Table 2 of Exhibit F, below. Table 2 of Exhibit F: Discount Scale Definitions
perturbation.changed_text: EXHIBIT F Discounts Table 1 of Exhibit F: Discount Scheme for Miltenyi Products, forecasted to be purchased by Bellicum under the Supply Agreement 50 MILTENYI & BELLICUM Supply Agreement (Execution CopyMarch 27, 2019) [...***...]
perturbation.explanation: By omitting 'For Discount Scale Definition, see Table 2 of Exhibit F, below. Table 2 of Exhibit F: Discount Scale Definitions' from Exhibit F, Table 1 of Exhibit F now has no proper scale definition. This introduces an in-text contradiction since the discount scheme is mentioned, but there is no scale definition reffering to the discount values for specific Miltenyi Products.
perturbation.contradicted_text: EXHIBIT F Discounts Table 1 of Exhibit F: Discount Scheme for Miltenyi Products, forecasted to be purchased by Bellicum under the Supply Agreement 50 MILTENYI & BELLICUM Supply Agreement (Execution CopyMarch 27, 2019) [...***...]
perturbation.justification: The omission of the discount scale definition from Exhibit F creates a contradiction. Table 1, as presented in both the changed text and the contradicted text, refers to a 'Discount Scheme' but lacks a corresponding scale. This omission means there's no way to determine the actual discount values for Miltenyi Products, directly conflicting with the existence of the discount scheme mentioned in Table 1. The original text explicitly states 'For Discount Scale Definition, see Table 2 of Exhibit F, below. Table 2 of Exhibit F: Discount Scale Definitions', which is removed in the changed text, creating the contradiction.
